result.content:
FINAL_ANSWER: No, resonance is impossible.
JUSTIFICATION: The Unruh frequency associated with cosmological acceleration $a \sim cH_0$ is approximately the Hubble scale $\omega_U \sim H_0$. In contrast, the Compton frequency $\omega_C = mc^2/\hbar$ is many orders of magnitude larger. The ratio $\omega_U / \omega_C \sim H_0 / (mc^2/\hbar) \ll 1$ represents a massive dimensional/scale gap, precluding any possibility of resonance.
